title: [Snyk Code] Jinja auto-escape is set to false.
description:
## Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`
**File:** `plexus/reports/parameter_utils.py`
**Location:** line 175, column 11 to line 175, column 22
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-79
### Snippet (plexus/reports/parameter_utils.py:173-177)
```
 173 |     
 174 |     # Create Jinja2 environment
 175 |     env = Environment(
 176 |         undefined=StrictUndefined if strict else None,
 177 |         trim_blocks=True,
```

**Issue Key:** 3a4836e9-f454-4b8f-9451-6a63403aeefa

### Details
Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
